items.title: ELLE Men Thailand July 2026 cover: TIMETHAI wears Generation Gucci by Demna
items.summary: Thai regional edition cover-story feature on young Thai artist TIMETHAI (Thamthai Plaengsilp), styled in multiple looks from Gucci's Generation Gucci collection under Demna, framed around his personal-identity narrative. Descriptive editorial fashion feature with no independent critical verdict; treated as activation-adjacent coverage (regional press placement of Gucci product, not organic public reaction).
